tasks.name: Task 1: FTS5 migration + search module
tasks.notes: Migration 002_fts5.sql creates fts_message_content FTS5 virtual table. fts.rs provides rebuild_fts_index and search_messages. schema.rs registers migration 002. db.rs test assertion updated from 1 to 2 migration versions (auto-fix Rule 1).

tasks.name: Task 2: Query builder + stats + FTS rebuild in sync
tasks.notes: query.rs provides 9 query functions (list_sessions, query_messages, token_stats_by_model, token_stats_by_session, tool_frequency, model_breakdown, version_history, schema_drift_list, session_messages_for_export). sync.rs calls fts::rebuild_fts_index after sync_all when files_synced > 0. lib.rs declares pub mod fts and pub mod query.

decisions: FTS5 external-content mode with rebuild-after-sync to avoid storage duplication
User query input sanitized by double-quote wrapping to prevent FTS5 syntax injection
Dynamic query parameters use Box<dyn ToSql> with params_from_iter for variable-count WHERE clauses
COALESCE used in SQL aggregation for NULL-safety on optional token fields

deviations.description: Fixed hardcoded migration count assertion in db.rs test (1 -> 2) after adding migration 002
